meta.repo_status: draft-only; not created live by DIG-47
meta.required_review: manual notification-only run before cron or writeback

nodes.name: Set Runtime Config
nodes.notes: Keep emit_raw_records=false, allow_sends_or_mutations=false, and allow_certificate_operations=false. Dedicated n8n credential/env CERTOPUS_API_KEY_AUTOMATION is required before production scheduling.

nodes.name: Certopus Templates Summary (GET only)
nodes.notes: Summarize template category/count metadata only. Do not emit template bodies, artwork/background payloads, email-template bodies, IDs tied to campaigns, or raw records.

nodes.name: Certopus Organisations Summary (GET only)
nodes.notes: Summarize organisation count/integrationAllowed presence only. Do not emit organisation names, image URLs, brand images, brand signatures, or raw payloads.

nodes.name: Certopus Wallet Summary (GET only)
nodes.notes: Count-only wallet/certificate presence check. Do not emit recipient-linked certificate IDs, wallet addresses, transaction details, or certificate records.

nodes.name: Certopus SMTP Summary (GET only)
nodes.notes: Presence/empty status only. Do not emit SMTP hostnames, usernames, passwords, ports, sender identities, DKIM/SPF details, or raw configuration.

nodes.name: Normalize Data-Minimized Results
nodes.notes: Drops samples/raw bodies and keeps only aggregate connector health fields.

nodes.name: Build Operator Digest
nodes.notes: Digest is safe for notification after manual review.

nodes.name: Notify Operator (configure credential)
nodes.notes: Replace with Email/Slack/Discord node after credential setup. Keep Cron, Paperclip, and GitHub writeback disabled until a notification-only run is reviewed.
